name: AEGIS
description: AEGIS is a Tauri 2 desktop app providing cognitive resource management for Windows. Monitors CPU, IO, network, memory, and power. Three-component architecture: Rust tray, Node intelligence sidecar, WebView cockpit UI.
purpose: Direct system resources intelligently — ambient awareness layer between KERNL and the OS.
success_criteria: Runs stably at boot with <50MB RAM
tray.rs fixed and cargo tauri build produces working installer
notes: Build output redirected to D:\Tools\.cargo-target\release\. Never installs to C:\. ARCHITECTURE.md is single source of truth. Obsolete v2 src/ daemon code deleted.
author: dk-001
